title: Tomás Giorello
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
[[File:Kintan_strider_TotG.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A [[Kintan strider/Legends|Kintan strider]] illustrated by Tomás Giorello for ''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'']]
'''Tomás Giorello''' is a cover artist from Buenos Aires, Argentina, who penciled several comics, including ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]''.

{{Artist-stub}}
